# Show dependencies of a function.
exec gorelo deps NewServer
stdout 'Server'

# Show dependencies of a type (includes method deps).
exec gorelo deps Server
stdout 'Config'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/test

go 1.21
-- server.go --
package main

type Config struct {
	Port int
}

type Server struct {
	Cfg Config
}

func (s *Server) Start() {
	_ = s.Cfg
}

func NewServer() *Server { return &Server{} }
